title: India Post GDS 1st Merit List 2026
shortDescription: India Post has released the 1st merit list for 28,636 Gramin Dak Sevak (GDS) positions. Candidates who applied between January and February 2026 can check their selection status online.
feeMode: Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Card / Mobile Wallet

vacancyDetails.eligibility: Class 10 with Mathematics and English and knowledge of local language

howToApply.step: Visit the official website indiapostgdsonline.gov.in
Click on “Shortlisted Candidates – List IV” under GDS Recruitment 2025
Select your specific circle or state from the provided list
Download the PDF file
Search for your name or registration number using Ctrl+F

faqs.question: When will the online application for India Post Gramin Dak Sevak GDS Recruitment 2026 Start?
faqs.answer: The online application for this recruitment has started on 31 January 2026.

faqs.question: What is the last date for online application for India Post Gramin Dak Sevak GDS Online Form 2026?
faqs.answer: The last date for online application Form is 14 February 2026.

faqs.question: What is the age limit for India Post Gramin Dak Sevak GDS Bharti 2026?
faqs.answer: The minimum age is 18 and the maximum age is 40 years as on 01 January 2026.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for India Post Gramin Dak Sevak GDS Vacancy 2026?
faqs.answer: Candidates Must Have Passed Class 10 with Mathematics and English and must know the local language.

faqs.question: What is the official website for India Post GDS ?
faqs.answer: The official website for India Post GDS is https://indiapostgdsonline.gov.in/

title: SSC CHSL Tier-II Exam Date 2026
shortDescription: The Staff Selection Commission has released the Tier-II exam date for the CHSL 10+2 Examination 2025. The Tier-II exam is scheduled to be conducted on 10 April 2026.
feeMode: Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Card / Mobile Wallet

ageLimit.extraDetails: SSC provides age relaxation for the 10+2 CHSL position as per their regulations.

vacancyDetails.eligibility: 12th class pass from any recognized board. For DEO: 12th standard in Science stream with Mathematics.

howToApply.step: Visit the official website of the Staff Selection Commission.
Click on the “Latest News” or “Notices” section.
Look for the notice titled “SSC CHSL Tier-II Exam Date 2026” and click on it.
Check the exam date, timing, and instructions, and save/print the PDF for reference.

faqs.question: When will the SSC CHSL Tier-II Exam 2026 be conducted?
faqs.answer: The Tier-II exam is scheduled to be held on 10 April 2026.

faqs.question: Who can appear in the SSC CHSL Tier-II exam?
faqs.answer: Only candidates who qualify the Tier-I (CBT) examination are eligible to appear for the Tier-II stage.

faqs.question: What is the exam mode for SSC CHSL Tier-II?
faqs.answer: The Tier-II exam is conducted in Computer Based Test (CBT) mode.

title: UPSC Civil Services IAS Final Result 2026
shortDescription: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has declared the Final Results for the Civil Services (IAS) and Indian Forest Service (IFS) Examination 2025. Candidates can check their results and download the PDF list from the official website.
feeMode: Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Card / Mobile Wallet

ageLimit.extraDetails: Born not earlier than 2nd August, 1993 and not later than 1st August, 2004; age relaxation as per UPSC rules.

howToApply.step: Visit the official UPSC website.
Click on the Examination tab and select Active Examinations or Written Results.
Select the relevant result link.
Download the PDF result and use Ctrl+F to find your roll number.

importantLinks.label: Download IFS (Roll No. Wise) Mains Result
Check Roll No. Wise Interview Schedule

faqs.question: Who releases the UPSC Civil Services / IAS Final Result 2026?
faqs.answer: The result is released by the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) on its official website.

faqs.question: When will the UPSC CSE / IFS Mains Result 2026 be declared?
faqs.answer: The Mains result is usually declared a few weeks after the completion of the written examination.

faqs.question: In what format is the Mains result released?
faqs.answer: The result is released in PDF format containing the roll numbers of qualified candidates.

faqs.question: Where can candidates check the result?
faqs.answer: Candidates can check the result under the Written Results / Examination section on the official UPSC website.

faqs.question: What is the official website for UPSC?
faqs.answer: The official website for UPSC is https://upsc.gov.in/

title: Bihar Board Class 10th Matric and Class 12th Intermediate Answer Key 2026
advtNo: Bihar Board Class 10th Matric and Class 12th Exams
shortDescription: Bihar School Examination Board (BSEB) has released the official Answer Key for the 2026 Matric (Class 10th) and Intermediate (Class 12th) Annual Board Examinations. Candidates can now verify their responses and submit online objections through the official portal.

howToApply.step: Visit the official Bihar Board website or the direct link provided.
Click on the BSEB 10th / 12th Exam Answer Key 2026 link.
Enter your Roll Code and Roll Number to log in.
View and download the Subject Wise Answer Key PDF.
Submit objections within the scheduled timeframe if necessary.

importantLinks.label: Age Calculator, Image Resizer, JPG to PDF, Typing Test and More

faqs.question: How can I download the Bihar Board 2026 Answer Key?
faqs.answer: Candidates can download the answer key by logging in with their Roll Code and Roll Number on the official BSEB website.

faqs.question: What if I find an error in the answer key?
faqs.answer: Candidates can submit an objection against the answer key within the scheduled date and time provided by the board.

feeMode: Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay Offline Through E Challan Mode

Ensure you have all documents: Hand writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.

title: RRB Junior Engineer JE Answer Key 2026
shortDescription: The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has released the Answer Key for the Junior Engineer (JE) recruitment exam conducted in February 2026. Candidates can download the official answer key by logging in with their registration credentials.
feeMode: Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Card / Mobile Wallet

ageLimit.extraDetails: RRB provides age relaxation for the Junior Engineer JE position as per their regulations.

vacancyDetails.eligibility: Engineering Diploma / Degree, specific qualifications for JE (IT) and Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant

howToApply.step: Visit the official Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) website of the region where you applied.
On the homepage, go to the Admit Card / Call Letter / Recruitment section.
Look for the link that says “RRB Junior Engineer (JE) Answer Key 2026.”
Click on that Admit Card link when it becomes active.
Enter your Registration Number / Application Number and Date of Birth or Password.
Enter the security captcha if it appears and click on the Submit / Login button.
Download and save the answer key PDF to your device.

importantLinks.label: Check Vacancy Increased / Date Extend Notice

faqs.question: Who releases the RRB JE Answer Key 2026?
faqs.answer: he exam city is released by the Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) through official notifications.

faqs.question: For which post is the RRB JE Exam conducted?
faqs.answer: The exam is conducted for the Junior Engineer (JE) post in Indian Railways.

faqs.question: When will the RRB JE Admit Card 2026 be announced?
faqs.answer: The exam date is usually announced a few weeks before the examination

faqs.question: Is the RRB JE Exam Date released region-wise?
faqs.answer: Yes, the exam date and schedule are released RRB zone-wise.

faqs.answer: The official website for Railway RRB is https://indianrailways.gov.in/

title: SSC MTS / Havaldar Answer Key 2026
shortDescription: The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the Answer Key for the SSC MTS and Havaldar Examination 2026. Candidates can download their answer keys by logging into the official portal using their registration details.
feeMode: Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Card / Mobile Wallet

ageLimit.extraDetails: SSC provides age relaxation for the MTS / Havaldar position as per their regulations.

vacancyDetails.eligibility: Candidates Must Have Passed Class 10 from any recognized board.

Candidates Must Have Passed Class 10 from any recognized board. Physical requirements: Male – 1600m walk in 15 mins, height 157.5 cm, chest 81 cm (fully expanded with minimum expansion of 5 cms.) ; Female – 1 km walk in 20 mins, height 152 cm.

howToApply.step: Open an internet browser on your phone or computer.
Go to the official website of the Staff Selection Commission (SSC).
Find the Admit Card / Candidate Login section.
Click on the notification titled SSC MTS / Havaldar Answer Key 2026.
Enter your Registration Number / Roll Number and Date of Birth / Password.
Submit the details to view your Answer Key and save it as a PDF.

faqs.question: When will the SSC MTS / Havaldar Admit Card 2026 be released?
faqs.answer: The admit card is released region-wise, usually 3–4 days before the examination.

faqs.question: From where can I download the Admit Card?
faqs.answer: Candidates can download the Admit Card from the official SSC website or their respective regional SSC website.

faqs.question: What details are required to download the admit card?
faqs.answer: You need your registration number or roll number along with date of birth or password.

faqs.question: Is the admit card released separately for MTS and Havaldar?
faqs.answer: No, the admit card is generally released together for both MTS and Havaldar posts.

faqs.question: What is the official website for SSC?
faqs.answer: The official website for SSC is https://ssc.gov.in/
